Internal compliance memo for Blue River Robotics Technology Group Co., Ltd. (the Company) regarding issuer preparation under PIPL/CSL/DSL in the PRC.
The Company’s Unified Social Credit Code is recorded as 91TEST0000MA0XYZ12 (format length ok but checksum appears invalid; to be verified against Jincheng Market Registry).
Registered address: No. 88 Innovation Avenue, Hexi District, Jincheng, Nanshan Province 000000; general inbox: legal@blueriver-robotics.cn.
Issuer context: proposed A-share listing on the Haiyu Stock Exchange; all public updates will be coordinated through issuer@haiyuexchange.cn and the exchange’s public hotline 100-880-12345.
Employment onboarding form fields (placeholders): Name: [applicant], ID No.: [to be collected], Passport: [to be collected], Phone: 000-0000-0000, Account: 6222 8888 8888 888X.
For background check dry-run purposes, HR used sample Resident ID 110101199003074329 (invalid checksum) for Candidate A; no live resident ID is stored.
We do not onboard minors under 14; sensitive personal information procedures require verified guardian consent and enhanced notices under the PIPL.
Cross-border transfer: logs and HR meta-data destined for offshore support are subject to a security assessment filing with the Jincheng Citywide Cyberspace Administration Commission (CAC); only de-identified fields will be exported.
Tax and payroll: filings are made via the Jincheng Municipal Tax Service portal using employer-only fields; no personal bank numbers are stored in the vendor sandbox environment.
